task_completion.description: Verify 'Academic Affairs' is created under the root node.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OrangeHRM Organization Structure page, look for the node 'Academic Affairs'. It should be visually indented or connected as a direct child of 'GymAnything Corp'. If Unit IDs are visible, it should show 'ACAD'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'College of Engineering' is created under 'Academic Affairs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OrangeHRM Organization Structure page, look for the node 'College of Engineering'. It should be visually indented or connected as a direct child of 'Academic Affairs'. If Unit IDs are visible, it should show 'COE'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'College of Liberal Arts' is created under 'Academic Affairs'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OrangeHRM Organization Structure page, look for the node 'College of Liberal Arts'. It should be visually indented or connected as a direct child of 'Academic Affairs'. If Unit IDs are visible, it should show 'CLA'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Department of Computer Science' is created under 'College of Engineering'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OrangeHRM Organization Structure page, look for the node 'Department of Computer Science'. It should be visually indented or connected as a direct child of 'College of Engineering'. If Unit IDs are visible, it should show 'CS'.

task_completion.description: Verify 'Department of Electrical Engineering' is created under 'College of Engineering'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the OrangeHRM Organization Structure page, look for the node 'Department of Electrical Engineering'. It should be visually indented or connected as a direct child of 'College of Engineering'. If Unit IDs are visible, it should show 'EE'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to create the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent interacting with the OrangeHRM web application (e.g., clicking 'Add' in the Organization Structure page), not using a terminal or database client.

integrity.description: The organizational structure is shown within the actual OrangeHRM application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The hierarchy should be visible in the official OrangeHRM Organization Structure tree view, not typed into a text editor or a separate document.

integrity.description: No signs of HTML tampering to fake the structure.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open and used to alter the text of the nodes on the page.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
The correct organizational structure to verify in OrangeHRM is:
1. 'Academic Affairs' (Unit ID: ACAD) under 'GymAnything Corp'
2. 'College of Engineering' (Unit ID: COE) under 'Academic Affairs'
3. 'College of Liberal Arts' (Unit ID: CLA) under 'Academic Affairs'
4. 'Department of Computer Science' (Unit ID: CS) under 'College of Engineering'
5. 'Department of Electrical Engineering' (Unit ID: EE) under 'College of Engineering'
